subcodes.first_line: O thou who clingest to the hem of bounty! In this world fraught with woe, what hope can attain fruition and what [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تشبث بذیل العطاٌ در این جهان پر ملال چه امال حصوف پذیرد وچه
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @origin of the soul; the soul as emanation
